raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta fatka Amos: Je-
robeams nomirs zaur Sohbinu/
un Israëls taps weschus no sa-
was Semmes aiswests.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to fazztja Amaztjus
uhs Amosu: Tu Redsetajs/ etj
nohſt/ nobehſ uhs to Semmi
Juhda/ un ehd tur Maisi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fluddina tur/ bet
eekſch Beteles tew ne buhs jo-
probjan wairs fluddinant/ jo ta
irr ta Kehnina fwehta Weeta/
un ta irr tahs Walstibas Nams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Amos/ un
fazzija uhs Amaziju: Es ne bi-
in Praweets / nedg Praweeta
Dehls/ bet es biju weens Lohpu-
Gans/ un nolaſtju Mescha-
Wihges.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas KUNGS neh-
me manni no ta gannama Pul-
ka/ un tas KUNGS fazzija us
man: Etj/ fluddina uhs man-
neem Israëka Laudim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ klausi ta KUN-
GA Wahrdu/ tu fattki: Ne
fluddina prett Israëlu / un ne
pillina prett Ibsaëka Nammu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ta fatka tas
KUNGS: Tawa Seewa taps
Bilsjahta par weenn Mauku/
un tavı Dehli un tawas Mei-
tas krittibs zaur Sohbinu/ un
tawa Semme taps zaur Auſti
isdallita/ un tu nomirst ne-
tchihſta Semmē/ un Israële
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "taps weschtus no tawas So-
mes aiswests.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta VIII. Modalla.
Tami Praweetam ktuhſt zaar weenu Par-
ſchanu no weena. Kurwja pilna ar e-
kuscheem Waffaras Angteem/ tahs Sem-
Iſpohſſſchana parahdita : 1. Ar we-
Sohdibas Gluddinaschanaſ prett teem
leelakeem Grehkeem/ kas to Lauschu
på bija: 4. Par fo teem buhs peen-
teem/ un fewischti ar garriga Badda
Slahpehm fohditeem ktuht :9/11.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "As KUNGS KUNGS
ſlikke man tchahdu Le-
Predseht/ un rangi/ tur-
ja weens Kurwis ar Waffa
Augteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch fazztja: Ro-
dſi tu Amos? Un es fazzi-
Weenu Kurwi ar Waffa-
Augteem. Tad fazztja
KUNGS uhs man: Tas G-
irr nahzis pahr manneem J-
etä Laudim/ es tohs ne gri-
wairs fandseht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ta Deewa Nam-
Dseetmas taps tai Deena-
Rauſschannu/ takka tas KU-
KUNGS: Tur buhs dauds-
mirruschas Mecfas/ itta-
Weeta taps tee fleppeni noi-
ftas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Klaufajt scho/ juhs/
juhs to Nabbagn eerihjat/
isnuhzinajat tohs Behoigus ee-
tahs Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fattajt: Kad pah-
tas jauns Mehnes/ ka m-
Labbibu pahrdohdain? Un-
Swchdeena/ ka mehs Labbi-
Klehtis atdarriht warrain/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
